name: Haulage Trip Summary
html:
{% set fin = frappe.call('haulage_mgmt.haulage_logistics.trip_financials.get_trip_financial_summary', doc.name) %}

{{ _('Trip summary') }} — {{ doc.name }}

{{ _('Status') }}: {{ _(fin.trip_status) }}{{ _('Truck') }}: {{ doc.truck or '—' }}{{ _('Driver') }}: {{ doc.driver or '—' }}{{ _('Departure') }}: {% if doc.departure_date %}{{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(doc.departure_date) }}{% else %}—{% endif %}

{{ _('Revenue (shipments)') }}

{% for line in fin.revenue_lines %}{% else %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Shipping Request') }}{{ _('Customer') }}{{ _('Agreed Price') }}
{{ line.shipping_request }}{{ line.customer or '—' }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(line.agreed_price) }}
{{ _('No shipments.') }}

{{ _('Expenses') }}

{% for e in doc.trip_expenses %}{% else %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Type') }}{{ _('Date') }}{{ _('Amount') }}
{{ e.expense_type }}{{ e.expense_date }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(e.amount) }}
—

{{ _('Custody') }}

{% for c in doc.trip_custodies %}{% else %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Custody Type') }}{{ _('Date') }}{{ _('Amount') }}
{{ c.custody_type }}{{ c.custody_date }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(c.amount) }}
—
{{ _('Total revenue') }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(fin.total_revenue) }}
{{ _('Total expenses') }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(fin.total_expenses) }}
{{ _('Total custody') }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(fin.total_custody) }}
{{ _('Net income') }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(fin.net_income) }}
